batch_objective: Multi-line A2L header parsing — the P-1b PREREQUISITE (split batch-A of two). Make the A2L parser correctly read CHARACTERISTIC / MEASUREMENT / AXIS_DESCR headers whose mandatory parameters span multiple lines (the real ASAM convention), so char_type / deposit(record_layout) / address / axis MaxAxisPoints populate instead of None. Core-parser change: parse_characteristic_header + parse_measurement_header (multi-line token assembly), _first_header_line (gather full header), build_section_tree (/* */ comment stripping), axis_meta capture (full AXIS_DESCR body + external flag). Requires an a2l.py UNFREEZE (operator-approved). Follow-up batch-55 = the inline-axis length summer (P-1b proper) built on this.
